description: This file defines dark theme color variables and styling references for a Bootstrap-based project, including colors for text, backgrounds, borders, form elements, accordions, and carousels, tailored for dark mode.
external_files: possibly other SCSS files that define base colors and mixins used here (not explicitly referenced but implied)

methods.name: tint-color
methods.description: Adjusts the tint (lighten) of a color by a specified percentage.

methods.name: shade-color
methods.description: Darkens a color by a specified percentage.

methods.name: shift-color
methods.description: Shifts the hue of a color by a specified amount.

methods.name: mix
methods.description: Mixes two colors together with a specified ratio.
